background.usage: body background, span background, a color, button color, var(--tw-ring-offset-color), var(--tw-prose-invert-headings), var(--tw-prose-invert-links), var(--tw-prose-invert-bold), var(--tw-prose-invert-kbd), var(--tw-prose-invert-code), var(--normal-bg)

text.usage: body background, span background, a color, button color

text-subtle.usage: body color, h1 color, h2 color, h3 color, h4 color, span color, nav color, var(--gray4)

heading-1.fontFamily: GeistPixelSquare, Geist Mono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Roboto Mono, Menlo, Monaco, Liberation Mono, DejaVu Sans Mono, Courier New, monospace, GeistMono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Roboto Mono, Menlo, Monaco, Liberation Mono, DejaVu Sans Mono, Courier New, monospace, ui-monospace, monospace

heading-2.fontFamily: GeistMono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Roboto Mono, Menlo, Monaco, Liberation Mono, DejaVu Sans Mono, Courier New, monospace, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

body.fontFamily: Inter, Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, Noto Sans CJK JP, Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN, Hiragino Sans, Yu Gothic, Meiryo, sans-serif
